news.title: Lambda wins cloud deal with Hudson River Trading to supply access to Nvidia chips
news.summary: Artificial intelligence cloud computing startup ‌Lambda on Wednesday said it has won a ‌cloud contract with high-speed trading firm Hudson River Trading.  Lambda, which is ​backed by Nvidia and raised $1.5 billion last year after signing a deal to provide Microsoft with access to Nvidia's chips, said the deal with Hudson River Trading ‌will entail renting ⁠more than 1,000 of Nvidia's latest "Blackwell" systems to the trading firm, which Reuters last ⁠month reported had $12.3 billion in trading revenue last year.

news.title: Oil Prices Drop Amid Report Tankers Are Moving Through Hormuz, Russia Crude Waivers
news.summary: Oil prices were falling Wednesday following a report that three supertankers were moving through the Strait of Hormuz.  Crude prices are still elevated and several ships transiting the strait won’t change that.  Two Chinese supertankers passed through the strait early Wednesday, Reuters reported, citing shipping data from LSEG and Kpler.
